overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character riding a horse through mountainous wilderness. The journey traverses pine forests, crosses a shallow river, and follows rocky cliffside trails before joining a group of riders approaching a wooden bridge over a lake.

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at a steady pace along a winding dirt path through a dense pine forest

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine trees lining both sides of the trail creating a dense forest canopy
narrow dirt path winding through the forest with visible hoof prints
rocky mountain terrain visible through gaps in the tree line
large gray boulder formation beside the trail casting shadows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a solo horseback ride through a dense pine forest. The rider follows a narrow dirt trail surrounded by tall evergreen trees, with rocky mountain slopes visible in the distance. Sunlight filters through the canopy creating dappled lighting on the path ahead.

events.description: horse enters the shallow river, transitioning from dirt trail to water surface

agents.ego_description: guiding the horse through the shallow river, water splashing around the horse's hooves

entered.detail: clear shallow river water flowing over smooth stones
smooth stones and pebbles visible beneath the water surface

segments.scene_description: The rider enters a shallow mountain river, the horse splashing through clear water flowing over smooth stones. The surrounding vegetation becomes sparser as the trail crosses the water, with the forest continuing on the opposite bank.

agents.ego_description: navigating the horse along a narrow rocky path winding between large boulders and cliff formations

entered.detail: rocky gravel trail with loose stones and dirt
massive gray rock formations flanking the narrow trail
steep rock face rising beside the path

segments.scene_description: Exiting the river, the rider traverses a narrow rocky passage with large boulders and cliff faces flanking the gravel path. The terrain becomes more rugged and enclosed, with sparse vegetation and rocky outcrops dominating the landscape.

events.description: encounters three other riders on horseback, joining them on the trail

agents.ego_description: riding alongside three companions through narrow rocky passages and steep terrain

notable_agents.action: companion rider on brown horse leading through the rocky gap
companion rider on white horse following the group

entered.detail: narrow gap between tall rock walls
tall vertical rock faces forming a narrow canyon
scattered large rocks and stone debris beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The rider meets three companions on horseback and joins them in riding through a narrow rocky mountain pass. The trail winds between tall cliff walls and boulder fields, with the group navigating the enclosed terrain together.

events.description: trail opens to reveal a mountain lake and wooden bridge in the valley below

agents.ego_description: riding along a narrow cliffside path with companions, overlooking a valley with a lake

notable_agents.action: companion rider navigating the narrow cliff edge trail

entered.detail: narrow dirt path along the edge of a steep cliff
deep valley drop-off with distant forest below
calm lake water visible in the valley below
wooden plank bridge crossing the lake at the trail destination

segments.scene_description: The group rides along a precarious cliffside trail with a steep drop-off revealing a valley below. As they progress, the view opens to show a mountain lake and a wooden bridge in the distance. The trail descends toward the water as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the sheltered depths of a pine forest into an expansive, high-altitude mountain vista. It begins with a solo ride along a narrow dirt trail where sunlight filters through a dense evergreen canopy, before the path descends into a shallow mountain river that splashes over smooth stones. As the rider exits the water, the lush vegetation gives way to a rugged, enclosed passage of large boulders and steep cliff faces. The scene then shifts as the rider joins three companions, navigating together through a narrow rocky pass flanked by towering walls. Finally, the trail winds along a precarious cliffside with a steep drop-off, gradually opening up to reveal a wide valley and a distant wooden bridge spanning a mountain lake.
